details.reasoning: Implementation successfully meets all rubric requirements: (1) New provider package created at packages/pixelart/ with proper package.json, (2) createPixelArt factory function exported, (3) PixelArtProvider interface defined and returned, (4) PixelArtImageModel with doGenerate method (correct for AI SDK v3 spec), (5) Image settings support size, style ('pixel', 'retro', '8bit'), and pixelDensity via schema, (6) Base URL correctly set to 'https://api.pixelart.ai/v1', (7) Package structure matches existing AI SDK providers with tsconfig, tsup, vitest configs, proper exports, (8) No existing provider packages modified except tsconfig.json to add reference. Additional strengths: comprehensive test coverage, proper error handling, environment variable support for API key, user agent tracking. Minor: PLAN.md file is empty but not a requirement violation.
